---
title: 'Function: disableCache()'
---

> **disableCache**(): `void`

Defined in: [cache.ts:734](https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo/blob/main/src/cache.ts#L734)

Disable the shared promptfoo cache for future calls.

## Returns

`void`

## Example

```ts
import { cache } from 'promptfoo';

cache.disableCache();
```
